_comment: AskUserQuestion payload variant for the decisions template. Used when the active surface is Claude Code and the host agent wants to surface a decision as an AskUserQuestion call. Each option carries label + description so the renderer can build a CC-native payload.
intro: Pick the option that best fits this spec's constraints.

options.label: A
options.description: <≤2-line explanation; what you give up vs the others>

rationale: <why this option wins given THIS spec's constraints>
